leadText: A Rock Tera Shard (Japanese: テラピースいわ Tera Piece Rock) is a type of item introduced in Generation IX. It is a type of Tera Shard, which can be used to change the Tera Type of a Pokémon. It corresponds to the Rock type.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] 50 Rock Tera Shards can be used to change a Pokémon's Tera Type to Rock at the Treasure Eatery in Medali , except for Ogerpon and Terapagos , the former of which already has its Tera Type fixed to Rock in its Cornerstone Mask form.

sections.title: Acquisition
sections.text: Acquisition [ edit | edit source ] Games Finite methods Repeatable methods S V Area Zero , North Province (Area One) Naranja Academy S / Uva Academy V (from Tyme after completing her storyline) Academy Ace Tournament Tera Raid Battles (3★ onwards) S V TM Wistful Fields Ogre Oustin' S V ID Area Zero Underdepths , Canyon Biome , Coastal Biome , Polar Biome , Savanna Biome Item Printer Distribution [ edit | edit source ] Games Event Language/Region Distribution period S V Pokémon Stamp Rally 2024 Tera Shards All July 12 to October 31, 2024 PJCS 2025 Participation Tera Shards All June 21 to September 30, 2025 Shiny Treasures of Ruin Tera Shards All September 5 to 30, 2025

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description S V ZA On rare occasions, these shards form when a Tera Pokémon falls in battle and its Tera Jewel shatters.
